title: MikroTik RBD25G-5HPacQD2HPnD, Audience
description: Wi-Fi has to be fast, reliable, easy to manage, it must reach every room and every corner. That is exactly what Audience devices can deliver in grand style â even in the biggest houses! Audience is a tri-band (one 2.4 GHz & two 5 GHz) home access point with meshing technology. If you need Wi-Fi in a huge building with all kinds of obstacles, simply add more Audience devices to your network â with a press of a button they will sync seamlessly and create a single Wi-Fi network to cover the whole premises. The initial setup is also very simple â download the iOS or Android MikroTik app, it will connect to the router and guide you through a quick setup process In some cases a single Audience unit might be able to replace several other routers â in our tests it covered 1858 m2 easily. It depends on the amount of obstacles, Wi-Fi clients and interference, so results may vary Dual-chain 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz wireless coverage will solve most interference issues in a crowded environment. For example, you can simultaneously use the 2.4 GHz channel for all your household mobile devices and reserve the 5 GHz channel for your PC or TV Device Power adapter 24V / 1.5A Patch cable
